text:

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    sys/netinet          ip_fw2.c 
  Log:
  Handle a list of IPv6 src and dst addresses correctly, eg.
  ipfw add allow ip6 from any to 2000::/16,2002::/16
  
  PR:             102422 (part 3)
  Submitted by:   Andrey V. Elsukov <bu7cher at yandex dot ru>
  MFC after:      5 days
